calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Competence-localization diagnostic (all-ON forage): OFAT over P1-budget / frozen-encoder / mechanism-interference vs a greedy-oracle positive control
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[], non_contributory, PROMOTES NOTHING). Localizes WHY the integrated all-ON REE-v3 agent foraged 0.065/0.0/0.455 resources/ep (below 1.0 floor, 0/3 seeds) in failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-719a_2026-07-08 -- shared root of the 654h/485i/625e/460h/460i substrate_not_ready retest wall. OFAT: baseline A0 (719a all-ON P1=90 frozen) + single-factor arms A1 (P1=300, thin-budget), A2 (encoder unfrozen in P1), A3 (minimal forage-only config, mechanism-interference), + A4 recovery ceiling (minimal+P1=300+unfrozen). Greedy nearest-resource oracle positive control validates the 1.0 floor is achievable in-env. Self-route readiness/present(competence_lever_localized)/diffuse -- HYPOTHESIS not verdict; route to /failure-autopsy. BRAKE-EXEMPT: different question than ARC-062/MECH-309 (why incompetent, not committed-action collapse); tags NO claim. Feeds /implement-substrate f_dominance_conversion_ceiling competence/training-regime build. arm_cell self-mints per-cell fingerprints (no separate baseline mint: bespoke diagnostic arm configs, no lineage family expected).

items.title: Trained all-ON capability point (WS-3): 4-metric yardstick on the 724 A0-trained all-ON stack vs 727 floor/ceiling scale
items.note: BASELINE (experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[], non_contributory, PROMOTES NOTHING; EXCLUDED from governance scoring). WS-3 of ree_ai_design_critique_plan.md OWED next step: lands the TRAINED all-ON stack on ALL FOUR capability_eval metrics (foraging_competence / survival_horizon / goal_reach_rate / planning_depth) against the V3-EXQ-727 random-floor / greedy-oracle scale, closing the "reported alongside every all-ON run" clause. Three arms x 3 seeds: random_walk (FLOOR), ree_trained_allon (all-ON 714 ARM_ON trained with the V3-EXQ-724 A0 recipe: P0=200 world-model warmup + P1=90 two-head REINFORCE [lateral-PFC bias + OFC devaluation], SD-056 e2 encoder FROZEN through P1), greedy_oracle (CEILING; reused verbatim from 724 positive control). Eval via the yardstick REEForwardPolicy (identical path to 727 p0warmup arm -> 727-vs-728 isolates P1 competence-training effect; mechanism-agnostic, no P2 OFC-viability injection, so NOT required to reproduce 724 A0 P2 DV byte-for-byte). Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): oracle clears the 1.0 floor AND oracle>random on foraging -> trained_allon_capability_point_landed; else substrate_not_ready_requeue. Trained-point supra-floor status + normalized positions are REPORTED CONTEXT, not a governance verdict (excluded from scoring). NO baseline mint: substrate in flux for this lineage (724-A0 recipe re-tunes per iteration) + the trained all-ON point IS the denominator, not a reusable OFF arm. Dry-run PASS (oracle 3.5>random 0.0 forage/ep; trained arm P0+P1 harness runs clean; all 4 metrics normalize on the scale).

items.title: MECH-268 dACC conflict-saturation LIVE-LOOP falsifier (ecological analogue of 463b)
items.note: Ecological (live-loop) analogue of V3-EXQ-463b. 463b validated MECH-268 f_sat ONLY via manual per-step record_outcome injection (synthetic). This run makes NO manual record_outcome call and proves the DACC _outcome_history FIFO is filled by the LIVE agent.py select_action tail (F-C3 wiring, ree-v3 main c7fc045, 2026-07-09) via a counting spy; chronic-harm env (num_hazards=6) keeps z_harm_a supra-threshold so the recurring harm class saturates. ARM_ON final-third sat_factor<0.95 vs ARM_OFF ~1.0 (OFF also has zero live record calls -- gating check). CLEARS a re-derive brake: MECH-268 had 5 substrate_ceiling autopsies (SD-034-closure-cluster 2026-06-12, SD-034-closure-control-plane-d 2026-06-13, V3-EXQ-460b-461b-464b-466b 2026-06-04, V3-EXQ-468e 2026-06-18, V3-EXQ-468f 2026-06-20) all PREDATING the c7fc045 live-path wiring this experiment is the first to exercise ecologically -- brake RELEASED per queue-experiment Step 2.5b (upstream substrate now BUILT). ARM_OFF is minted reuse-eligible (arm_cell, include_driver_script_in_hash=False; reuse assumes a cloud linux-x86_64-py3.10 claim). PROMOTES NOTHING -- closes the 'validated only via synthetic injection' gap (design_implementation_audit_2026-07-09.md sec 6, MECH-268 gov follow-up #2).

items.title: SD-063 conditional predictive-uncertainty head -- claim-tagged evidence confirmation (reproduces V3-EXQ-716 C1/C2/C3)
items.note: Claim-tagged (experiment_purpose=evidence, claim_ids=[SD-063]) companion to the V3-EXQ-716 diagnostic PASS, which cleared SD-063 v3_pending (2026-07-09) but deposited NO claim-scoring evidence (diagnostic/claim_ids=[]/non_contributory). Same design + same 3 load-bearing criteria (C1 CRPS quantile<point, C2 precision_error_corr over EMA null, C3 SD-031 agency residual preserved) under the same frozen-encoder-warmup + joint-training protocol. PASS -> deposits supports on SD-063 for a candidate->provisional promotion; criteria-FAIL -> weakens; readiness-unmet/degenerate -> non_contributory (scoring-excluded). NOT a correction (no supersedes); confirms v3_exq_716_sd063_conditional_uncertainty_validation. SD-031 C3 guard kept load-bearing. Smoke: dry-run PASS (init + both conditions + manifest + sentinel; dry-run self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue as designed on the toy transition floor).
